  • Uses of FieldExpression in io.github.projectunified.cronutils.model.field.expression

    Subclasses of FieldExpression in io.github.projectunified.cronutils.model.field.expression
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Always
    Represents a star (*) value on cron expression field.
    class 
    And
    Represents a conjunction of cron expressions for a field.
    class 
    Between
    Represents a range in a cron expression.
    class 
    Every
    Represents every x time on a cron field.
    class 
    On
     
    final class 
    QuestionMark
    Represents a question mark (?)
    class 
    RandomExpression
    Represents a random value expression in a cron field, using the '~' character.
